calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler. Plaintiff, Gilbert W. Chavis was represented by Michael S. Rossoff and Defendant, Ted Milkin appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties and read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
